crisis_awareness.label: News & Crisis Awareness
crisis_awareness.hypothesis: Crisis triggers spike in news consumption and information seeking

economic_anxiety.label: Economic Anxiety
economic_anxiety.hypothesis: Financial stress changes search and purchase intent signals

behavioral_shifts.label: Behavioral Shifts
behavioral_shifts.hypothesis: Crisis changes how people shop, move and spend time

wellness.label: Wellness & Mental Health
wellness.hypothesis: Prolonged stress surfaces as wellness and mental health interest

social_community.label: Social & Community
social_community.hypothesis: Crisis drives community-seeking and prosocial behavior
